---
title: "Statistics"
format: html
---

Coming soon... 


# Statistical Inference 

## Frequentist Statistics 


Normal Linear Models

T-tests

ANOVAs


## Bayesian Statistics 


# Statistical Modelling 

## Normal Linear Models

$$
 y_i \sim N(\mu_i, \sigma^2) \quad \quad \mu_i = \beta_0 + \sum^K_{k=1} \beta_k x_k
$$

```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(psych)
data(bfi)
View(bfi)

# Example of Simple linear regression 
lm(education ~ age + gender, data = bfi)
```
